biological_replicate: for the dissection of retinas from 10 bovine eyes.
technical_replicate: processed twice as two separate technical replicates for bottom-up proteomics.
experimental_design: method development for isolating retinal primary cilia
This study shows our method can be used to isolate retinal primary cilia.
factor_value: to isolate the primary cilia of photoreceptor cells from bovine retinas.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
